title: Senior AI/ML Engineer – Multi-Agent Systems
description: We're building a multi-agent orchestration platform and need an experienced AI engineer. You'll design and implement agent pipelines using LangChain/LangGraph, build RAG systems with vector databases (Qdrant/Pinecone), and integrate OpenAI + Claude APIs. Experience with Python, FastAPI, and Docker required. Must have shipped production AI systems.

title: Backend Engineer – FastAPI + PostgreSQL + AI Pipeline
description: Looking for a senior backend engineer to build a data intelligence platform. Core stack: FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker. You'll build REST APIs, data ingestion pipelines, and integrate LLM APIs for automated analysis. Experience with async Python, SQLAlchemy, and cloud deployment (AWS/GCP) required.

title: Full-Stack Developer – Next.js + Python AI Backend
description: Building a SaaS analytics dashboard. Frontend: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind. Backend: FastAPI + PostgreSQL. Need to integrate AI features: embeddings, semantic search, clustering. Looking for someone who can own the full stack. LaunchMentor-style product.

title: AWS Solutions Architect – DynamoDB + Cognito + AppSync
description: Need an AWS architect to design and implement a serverless backend. Stack: AWS Amplify, DynamoDB, Cognito, AppSync/GraphQL, Lambda. Experience with CDK/Terraform for IaC. Must have built compliance or enterprise platforms on AWS.

title: React Native Developer – iOS/Android App
description: Building a cross-platform mobile app with React Native. Basic REST API integration, push notifications, and offline support. Junior-to-mid level task, simple CRUD screens.

title: AI Chatbot Developer – GPT-4 Integration
description: Need someone to integrate GPT-4 into our customer support platform. Build conversation flows, prompt engineering, basic RAG with PDF documents. Python or Node.js backend.
